STRETCH MARKS

Deeply moisturizes the skin on your bum and lessens the visibility of stretch marks.

WALNUT SHELL POWDER

CELLULITE

Improves the overall look, feel and texture of your butt. You’ll be feeling smoother than a baby’s bum.

see full ingredients

Ingredients: Walnut Shell Powder (natural exfoliator), Organic Aloe Leaf Juice* (moisturizer), Decyl Glucoside (moisturizing agent), Lauryl Glucoside (cleansing agent), Cocamidopropyl Betaine (moisturizer), Phenoxyethanol (helps increase shelf life), Organic Lavender Flower Water (anti-inflammatory and anti-bacterial), Roman Chamomile Flower Water (antioxidant), Glycerin (moisturizes and protects skin), Provitamin B5 (helps skin regenerate new cells), Hydrolyzed Wheat Protein (moisturizer), Organic Oatstraw Extract* (calming agent for sensitive skin), Vitamin E (antioxidant), Sunflower Seed Oil (soothes skin), Organic White Willow Bark Extract*(natural exfoliator), Organic Jojoba Seed Oil* (long-lasting moisturizer & rich in vitamins), Rosehip Seed Oil (rich with vitamins and antioxidants), Organic Alcohol* (increases absorption of vitamins), Xanthan Gum (adds texture), Tetrasodium EDTA (helps increase shelf life) *Certified Organic Ingredient

how to use

Scrub that booty. In the shower or bath, take a small amount of Becky and mix with water to get a nice lather. Rub on your booty in circular motions and rinse. Note: A little product goes a long way. Becky will foam up into a lather and double in volume when wet.

<svg width="100%" height="100px" viewbox="0 0 1280 140" preserveaspectratio="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><g fill="#f3e5fe"><path d="M320 28C160 28 80 49 0 70V0h1280v70c-80 21-160 42-320 42-320 0-320-84-640-84z"></path></g></svg>

“The first time I used this scrub, my skin was so smooth. I honestly couldn’t believe it. Now, I’ve only been using it for a few weeks almost every day, but I’ve already seen a reduction in buttne and stretch marks.”

FAQ

IS BECKY VEGAN?

That’s correct, Becky is 100% vegan and cruelty-free. Becky has been formulated using 98% natural ingredients.

$20 FOR 2OZ?

First, our product doubles when wet and all of our ingredients are sourced in the United States. Our product is made in Portland, OR and we also use the same ingredients in high-end cosmetics. We cover the cost of shipping and donate a percentage of your order to Every Mother Counts, an organization that is committed to making pregnancy and childbirth safe for women everywhere. Oh… and we spent about $5 in ads just to get you reading this. 😉

how do i store my scrub?

We suggest storing it in a cool, dry place in between scrubs with the lid closed to prevent drying out.

why should i scrub?

Using a natural scrub like Becky has many benefits. Becky is a natural exfoliator that removes dead skin that can clog pores and helps regenerate new, healthy skin cells in its place. Becky is also loaded with vitamins and minerals that moisturize and protect your skin leading to a smoother, softer, better-looking butt.

how often should i scrub?

For the best results, we recommend scrubbing 2-3 times per week.

how long until i see results?

Our customers can expect to see results anywhere from the first couple of uses up to 2-3 weeks. Consistency is key, sticking to your routine will help you achieve the results you’re looking for. However, everyone’s body is different and results may vary.

can i use becky on my tattoo?

Becky doesn’t recommend using her scrub on a freshly inked butt. You should wait until the area has healed completely before scrubbing.

do you test on animals?

Nope! We would never do such a thing.

settings.code:
ALL ABOUT BECKY

Let’s talk about your booty. Why? Because it’s not getting enough recognition.

Walking down countless skincare aisles we saw endless amounts of “miracle” face masks, arm scrubs, and face wash but everyone seemed to forget about the bum. Our whole lives we’ve experienced bumps, cellulite, stretch marks, dry skin and other problems (we don’t want to discuss) so when we looked for a solution we were shocked to find out there was none. Literally nothing. For all the butts posted on Instagram, we thought we’d find some kind of miracle butt cream that Kylie Jenner was promoting but we couldn’t. So, we came to two realizations…
ALL ABOUT BECKY

Let’s talk about your booty.
Why?
Because it’s not getting enough recognition.

Walking down countless skincare aisles we saw endless amounts of “miracle” face masks, arm scrubs, and face wash but everyone seemed to forget about the bum.

Our whole lives we’ve experienced bumps, cellulite, stretch marks, dry skin and other problems (we don’t want to discuss) so when we looked for a solution we were shocked to find out there was none. Literally nothing. For all the butts posted on Instagram, we thought we’d find some kind of miracle butt cream that Kylie Jenner was promoting but we couldn’t. So, we came to two realizations…

SHOP THE SCRUB

<svg width="100%" height="100px" viewbox="0 0 1280 140" preserveaspectratio="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><g fill="#fff"><path d="M320 28C160 28 80 49 0 70V0h1280v70c-80 21-160 42-320 42-320 0-320-84-640-84z"></path></g></svg>

1) We’ re going to invent our own solution.

2) Photoshop is more popular than we thought.

Walking down countless skincare aisles we saw endless amounts of “miracle” face masks, arm scrubs, and face wash but everyone seemed to forget about the bum.

We found that big brands were too busy overcharging for products containing artificial ingredients, made in big factories, with shiny packaging, and marketed by women who looked like they haven’t eaten a carb in 3 years. We figured if we were going to introduce a brand new skincare product we might as well do it the right way. *Disclaimer: we eat carbs*

our social mission

Building a Future.
For Women.

You’re not the only woman benefiting from a better booty.

As a company, we donate 1% of all revenue to women’s causes around the world.
We are currently donating to Every Mother Counts, an organization that is committed to making pregnancy and childbirth safe for women everywhere. Together, we can build a brighter future for all women.

shop the scrub

Using Becky booty scrub stimulates blood flow and assists in regenerating new skin cells. The antioxidants and essential fatty acids target fine lines and dryness leaving your butt feeling softer and smoother.

The walnut shells on top of the mechanical energy on scrubbing your butt work together to break down the tissue that causes cellulite.
